overall.description: A first-person walk through a medieval marketplace at night, passing striped tents and candle-lit stalls toward a stone archway. The scene features warm torchlight, hanging pennant banners, and historic stone architecture, rendered in a video game engine.

scene_state.functional_zone: open medieval market square with merchant tents

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the market square, holding a wooden staff or weapon in the left hand

entered.detail: large canvas tent with red and cream vertical stripes, wooden support poles
open-air wooden stall with multiple lit candles providing warm illumination
tall stone facade with arched windows and doorway, medieval architecture
strings of red and cream triangular flags stretched overhead across the market

segments.scene_description: Walking through a dimly lit medieval market square at night. A large striped red and cream tent stands prominently on the left while a wooden stall with burning candles occupies the right. Overhead, red and cream pennant banners stretch across the path toward a stone building in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market passage leading to stone archway entrance

events.description: moving from open market square into narrower covered passage approaching stone archway

agents.ego_description: approaching the stone archway entrance, moving deeper into the enclosed market passage

entered.detail: large stone archway entrance with keystone, leading into the building interior
wooden ladder leaning against the right wall near fabric coverings
stack of hay or straw bales beside the path near the archway entrance

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the market, the path narrows under hanging pennant banners. The stone archway entrance looms ahead, flanked by wooden crates and hay bales. The striped tent and initial stalls fall behind as the camera approaches the arched stone doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dimly lit medieval market square that gradually narrows toward a looming stone entrance. It begins by passing a large red and cream striped tent on the left and a candle-lit wooden stall on the right, with pennant banners stretching overhead toward a distant building. As the camera moves deeper into the market, the open square gives way to a tighter path where the initial tents and stalls fall behind. The scene then shifts focus toward a stone archway flanked by wooden crates and hay bales before finally approaching the arched doorway.
